description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to master, and on published releases. The workflow should have read permissions to repository contents. It should have two jobs: one that builds a Python package using Python 3.10, installs build and twine, builds and checks the package, and uploads it as an artifact; and another job that waits for the first job to finish and, if triggered by a release event, downloads the artifact and publishes it to PyPI using the PyPI API token from secrets.
